headline: A Look At PPL (PPL) Valuation As Higher Q1 2026 Earnings And Rate Case Draw Attention
summary: Why PPL’s latest earnings setup is drawing fresh attention PPL (PPL) is back in focus as investors watch for Q1 2026 earnings, with expectations for higher profit per share and a recently filed base distribution rate increase intended to support grid reliability spending. See our latest analysis for PPL. The share price has been firming through 2026, with a 15.09% 90 day share price return and a 20.10% 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting momentum has been building as investors weigh...
